hero.headline: Digital tools for
hero.subtitle: WorldFish Digital is an open-source, modular ecosystem that turns fisheries data into decision-ready insights. Built with co-design principles, our platforms scale from landing-site monitoring to national dashboards.

features.title: PESKAS
features.description: An open-source ecosystem that turns fisheries data into decision-ready insights.

features.title: TASEGURU
features.description: Safety-at-sea app with real-time early warning capabilities and emergency SOS tools.

features.title: TRACKS-EXP
features.description: Vessel tracking insights paired with catch reports to monitor small-scale fishing trips.

about.title: Platforms & Infrastructure
about.subtitle: Asia Digital Hub & Digital Lab. Our digital architecture empowers partnerships by providing open, secure, and standardized data pipelines for research, governments, and small-scale fishing communities.

features.title: Digital Architecture
features.description: APIs, cloud infrastructure and data pipelines for seamless integration.

features.title: Data Standards
features.description: Compliant with Open ArtFish, FAO, and Agrovoc ontologies, ensuring data interoperability.

features.title: AI & Analytics
features.description: AI-ready machine learning pipelines and automated decision-support systems.

blogSection.title: News
blogSection.subtitle: Updates across WorldFish Digital and Peskas—releases, partnerships, pilots, and platform work.
